---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or future direction for Syx
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe what you would like Syx to do.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds.

## Scope notes

Is this related to any of these areas?

- RAG
- Daily memory
- Sleep cycle
- Dream cycle
- Agent memory interface
- Provider/model support
- Documentation
- Setup/Docker
- Security/privacy
- Other:

## Safety and privacy considerations

Could this feature affect memory contents, uploaded files, agent access, logs, secrets, or private project data?

## Additional context

Add any examples, links, or notes.
